description_long: This is a male doctor figure standing upright, dressed in a dark button-up shirt and matching dark trousers. He has short, neatly styled dark hair and a trimmed beard, and wears glasses with a thin frame. The doctor is accessorized with a brown belt and brown shoes, giving him a professional and polished appearance. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and his facial expression is neutral and approachable. The clothing is fitted and formal, lacking any visible medical accessories such as a white coat, stethoscope, or badge. The overall look is that of a professional in an urban or office setting, rather than a clinical environment.
description: A male doctor in dark formal attire with glasses, brown belt, and shoes, standing upright with a professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doctor's face, glasses, buttoned shirt, brown belt, and shoes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the fit of the shirt and trousers, and the shoe shape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, shirt, belt, and trousers, with arms slightly outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair, and overall silhouette.
